name: /feature emits per-commit token telemetry for downstream cost-transparency reporting
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/feature-runs profiles evals/specs && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && printf '{"name":"r","command":"true","feature_id":"feat-x"}\n' > evals/specs/feat-x.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/feature.sh" --feature-id feat-x --profile profiles/p.yaml --tokens-out .claude-tdd-pro/feature-runs/feat-x.json --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/feature-runs/feat-x.json ] && grep -q '"tokens_in"' .claude-tdd-pro/feature-runs/feat-x.json && grep -q '"tokens_out"' .claude-tdd-pro/feature-runs/feat-x.json && echo ok 1>&2
